plugin.name: 🤝 Amie Meeting Sync
plugin.description: Syncs meeting notes, summaries, action items, and audio from Amie into NotePlan daily and project notes. Requires a one-time relay server setup via install-relay.sh.
plugin.author: Ian Soper
plugin.lastUpdateInfo: v1.2.0: Honest relay auto-start via LaunchAgent installer. Removed broken applescript: URI approach.

plugin.commands.name: Sync Amie Meetings
plugin.commands.description: Fetch today's meetings from Amie and write them into NotePlan. Prompts you if the relay isn't running.

plugin.commands.name: Sync Amie Meetings for Date Range
plugin.commands.description: Fetch Amie meetings for a specific date range and write them into NotePlan.

plugin.commands.name: Amie Relay Status
plugin.commands.description: Check whether the Amie relay server is running and how many meetings are stored.

plugin.commands.name: Configure Amie Sync
plugin.commands.description: Set relay URL, API key, meeting notes folder, and task tag preferences.

plugin.settings.title: Relay Server URL
plugin.settings.description: URL of your local Amie webhook relay.

plugin.settings.title: Relay API Key
plugin.settings.description: Secret key for relay authentication. Generated by install-relay.sh and saved to .relay-api-key.

plugin.settings.title: Meeting Notes Folder
plugin.settings.description: NotePlan folder where individual meeting notes will be saved.

plugin.settings.title: Append Summary to Daily Note
plugin.settings.description: If enabled, a summary block with action items is also added to today's daily note.

plugin.settings.title: Action Item Tag
plugin.settings.description: Tag applied to synced action items so you can filter them in NotePlan.
